homePage.mainTitle: Zeinte (formerly AdivinaExamen): Your Smart Ally to Pass Exams
homePage.subtitle: Transform your notes and past exams into a powerful study tool. Upload your documents, and our AI in Zeinte will analyze the content, predict key questions, and help you prepare like never before.
homePage.step1Description: PDFs, DOCXs, TXTs... all your study material is welcome in Zeinte.
homePage.step2Description: Let our AI in Zeinte identify crucial information and predict questions.
homePage.step3Description: Practice with questions and detailed explanations in Zeinte.
homePage.choosePlanSubtitle: Start for free or unlock the full potential of Zeinte with our Pro Plan.
homePage.freeTrialDescription: Ideal for getting started and exploring Zeinte. During our Beta phase, enjoy more benefits!
homePage.proPlanFeature5: Save and manage your exams and analyses (future).
homePage.subscribeProButton: Subscribe to Zeinte Pro Plan (Coming Soon)
homePage.subscribeProAlert: Pro subscription functionality for Zeinte coming soon. Enjoy the Beta in the meantime!
homePage.revolutionizeStudyTitle: Ready to Revolutionize Your Study with Zeinte?
homePage.revolutionizeStudySubtitle: Stop guessing and start preparing with the artificial intelligence of Zeinte (formerly AdivinaExamen).
homePage.comingSoonTestimonials: Coming Soon: Success Stories and Testimonials with Zeinte

features.uploadDocsShort: Upload exams, syllabi, and notes (PDF, DOCX, TXT) to Zeinte.
features.uploadDocsLong: Drag and drop or select files from your device. Zeinte will process multiple formats to extract relevant information and prepare it for intelligent analysis.
features.deepAnalysisShort: Zeinte's AI identifies key themes and patterns from past exams.
features.deepAnalysisLong: Our artificial intelligence in Zeinte examines the content of your documents, identifying recurring themes, frequently asked questions, and the overall course structure. If it detects past exams, it analyzes their methodology and the relative importance of topics.
features.smartPredictionShort: Zeinte generates multiple-choice questions that might appear on your exam.
features.smartPredictionLong: Based on exhaustive analysis, Zeinte predicts possible exam questions. These questions are designed to mimic the style, difficulty, and format of real tests, giving you a unique advantage.
features.clearExplanationsShort: Understand each answer with professor-like explanations thanks to Zeinte.
features.clearExplanationsLong: For each multiple-choice question predicted, Zeinte's AI generates a detailed explanation. It not only tells you the correct answer but also reasons why it's correct and why other options are incorrect, as if you had a personal tutor.
features.interactiveStudyShort: View questions, answer, and get instant feedback in Zeinte.
features.interactiveStudyLong: Study efficiently with an interface designed for learning in Zeinte. Answer questions, check your correct and incorrect answers, and access detailed explanations to reinforce your knowledge.
features.customConfigShort: Tailor exam generation in Zeinte to your needs (number of questions).
features.customConfigLong: Adjust the default number of multiple-choice questions you want generated in Zeinte. These values will be used unless you change them at the time of generation.
features.studyCommunityShort: Explore forums and learn from others in the Zeinte community (current simulation).
features.studyCommunityLong: Access our Zeinte community section where you'll find simulated discussion forums with relevant topics for various competitive exams and studies. In the future, you'll be able to interact and share your own experiences.

dashboardPage.title: Study Dashboard - Zeinte
dashboardPage.emptySubtitle: It seems you haven't analyzed any documents yet in Zeinte. Upload your notes, syllabi, or exams to start studying intelligently!
dashboardPage.questionsReadyTitle: Questions Ready for Study in Zeinte!
dashboardPage.questionsReadyDescription: We've analyzed your documents, and these are the multiple-choice questions we believe might appear on your exam.
dashboardPage.reanalyzeButtonProTooltip: Upgrade to Pro to re-analyze documents in Zeinte (or wait 24h for another free one)
dashboardPage.upgradeProAlertReanalysis: the unlimited re-analysis feature and generation of more than 5 questions in Zeinte
dashboardPage.upgradeProAlertReanalysisMessage: You are viewing a limited number of questions, and some features are restricted in the free plan. You can generate one free exam per day in Zeinte.
dashboardPage.upgradeProAlertViewAll: view all generated questions in Zeinte
dashboardPage.upgradeProAlertViewAllMessage: You are viewing {{count}} of {{total}} generated questions.
dashboardPage.dailyLimitReachedDescription: You have reached the limit of one free exam per day in Zeinte. To generate more exams and access all advanced features, consider upgrading to our Pro Plan.
dashboardPage.betaAdNoticeDescription: Zeinte is currently in Beta and is 100% free to use. To help us cover server costs during this period, we've included some advertising. We appreciate your understanding and support as we work to improve the platform.

pauSpecial.title: Zeinte PAU Special
pauSpecial.description: Attention PAU students! During this exam period, Zeinte is fully unlocked so you can use the entire platform for free and without limits.
pauSpecial.feedbackRequest: We only ask for one thing in return: send us your impressions, suggestions, and what you would improve to
pauSpecial.tips: Remember to be precise in your exam requests and don't forget to upload your notes so the AI can be more accurate. Good luck!

predictedQuestionCard.viewBriefExplanation: View brief explanation of the answer
predictedQuestionCard.getAIDetailsButtonProTooltip: Upgrade to Pro for detailed explanations
predictedQuestionCard.errorCardDescription: This multiple-choice question does not have valid options or was not generated correctly.

aiExplanationDialog.title: AI Explanation - Zeinte
aiExplanationDialog.noExplanation: No explanation available or question not selected.

fileUploadArea.supportedFiles: Supported files: PDF, DOC, DOCX, TXT. Maximum {{maxFiles}} files.
fileUploadArea.storageWarning: Browser storage is limited. If the size is very large, the "Re-analyze" feature might not work.
fileUploadArea.exploreLibraryDescription: Access common exam templates or manage yours.
fileUploadArea.commonExamsDescription: Select a common exam type. This will populate the topic in the "AI Suggestions" section and search for related documents (simulated).{{proFeature}}
fileUploadArea.commonExamsDescriptionNoPro: Select a common exam type. This will populate the topic in the "AI Suggestions" section and search for related documents (simulated).
fileUploadArea.useCommonExamProTooltip: Pro Feature: Upgrade to use this option
fileUploadArea.searchingCommonExamToastDescription: The AI is generating document suggestions. Check the 'AI Suggestions' section shortly.
fileUploadArea.comingSoonCommunityExamsDescription: Here you'll be able to find and use exams and study material shared by other Zeinte users. Check back soon for new features!
fileUploadArea.comingSoonPersonalExamsDescription: Save and organize your own analyzed exams and documents in Zeinte for easy access.
fileUploadArea.comingSoonRecommendedExamsDescription: Based on your activity and study topics, Zeinte's AI will suggest exams and documents that might be useful to you.
fileUploadArea.aiDocSuggestionsDescription: Enter a topic, and Zeinte's AI will suggest titles and summaries of relevant documents. You can add their simulated content to the analysis.{{proFeature}}
fileUploadArea.aiDocSuggestionsDescriptionNoPro: Enter a topic, and Zeinte's AI will suggest titles and summaries of relevant documents. You can add their simulated content to the analysis.
fileUploadArea.searchTopicPlaceholder: E.g., Forest ranger exam, 20th Century Spanish History
fileUploadArea.aiSearchingToastTitle: Searching for AI Suggestions in Zeinte...
fileUploadArea.aiSearchingToastDescription: The AI is generating ideas for documents relevant to your topic. This may take a few moments.
fileUploadArea.aiSuggestionsReadyToastDescription: {{count}} suggestions found. Remember that detailed content is simulated.
fileUploadArea.finalAnalysisConfigDescription: Define the number of questions and the type of exam to generate.
fileUploadArea.examTypeWrittenExperimental: The 'Written' type is experimental. Questions may be more general.
fileUploadArea.selectedQuestionsFreeUserWarning: You have selected {{selectedCount}} questions, but {{maxCount}} will be generated due to your free plan in Zeinte.
fileUploadArea.dailyLimitReachedPopupDescription: You have reached the limit of one free exam per day in Zeinte. To generate more exams and access all advanced features, consider upgrading to our Pro Plan.
fileUploadArea.toastFileLimitExceededDescription: You can upload a maximum of {{maxFiles}} files at a time in Zeinte. This limit can be adjusted by the administrator.
fileUploadArea.toastNoContentSelectedDescription: Please select at least one file to upload or one document from AI search.
fileUploadArea.toastSizeExceedsLimitDescription: The total file size ({{totalSize}}) exceeds the suggested limit of {{maxSizeMB}}MB. This might affect the "Re-analyze" feature. You can proceed, but keep this in mind. This limit can be adjusted by the administrator.
fileUploadArea.toastEmptyContentDescription: Could not extract text from selected files or AI documents have no simulated content.
fileUploadArea.toastFreeUserLimitDescription: A maximum of {{maxQuestions}} questions will be generated for free users in Zeinte.
fileUploadArea.toastErrorProcessingFilesFallback: There was a problem reading the files.

uploadPage.processingDocumentToastDescription: Analyzing your document content in depth...
uploadPage.analysisCompleteToastDescription: Generating question predictions based on detailed analysis...
uploadPage.successToastDescription: Predicted questions ready for study. Redirecting to dashboard...
uploadPage.errorProcessingToastFallback: There was a problem analyzing the document or predicting questions.

loginPage.title: Login to Zeinte
loginPage.description: Access your Zeinte account to continue.
loginPage.firebaseNotConfiguredWarning: Firebase is not configured correctly. Please check your environment variables in `.env.local` and restart the server. Authentication will not work.
loginPage.configIncompleteToastDescription: Firebase is not configured. Check environment variables and restart the server.

signupPage.title: Create Zeinte Account
signupPage.firebaseNotConfiguredWarning: Firebase is not configured correctly. Please check your environment variables in `.env.local` and restart the server. Authentication will not work.
signupPage.signupSuccessEmailVerificationToastDescr: Welcome! A verification email has been sent to {{email}}. Please check your inbox (and spam folder) and click the link to activate your account. It might take a few minutes to arrive.
signupPage.betaWelcomeMessage: Welcome to Zeinte Beta! During this phase, all new accounts operate with enhanced Free Plan benefits, allowing you to explore most of our features. The full Pro Plan with all its exclusive advantages and payment gateway will be activated soon.
signupPage.betaAdNoticeTitle: Zeinte is in Beta and Free!
signupPage.betaAdNoticeDescription: Zeinte is currently 100% free during our Beta phase. To help us cover server costs, we've included some advertising. We appreciate your understanding and support!

profilePage.loginPrompt: Please log in to view your Zeinte profile.
profilePage.manageInfo: Manage your personal information and preferences in Zeinte.
profilePage.moreOptionsSoon: More profile options will be available soon in Zeinte.
profilePage.preferencesDescription: Select your main areas of interest. This will help us personalize your experience in the future (e.g., community recommendations).
profilePage.preferencesSavedToastDescription: Your interest preferences have been updated in Zeinte.
profilePage.errorSavingPreferencesToastDescription: Could not save your preferences in Zeinte.

configurePage.title: Configure Your Exam in Zeinte
configurePage.description: Adjust default options for exam generation in Zeinte.
configurePage.configSavedToastDescription: Your exam generation preferences have been updated.
configurePage.reanalyzeWarningDescription: The "Re-analyze and Generate New Exam" feature in the Zeinte Study Dashboard depends on the text content of previously uploaded documents. This content is saved in your browser's local storage, which has size limits (usually 5-10MB). If original documents are very large or numerous, they might not be fully saved, and the re-analysis function might not have enough data.

communityPage.title: Zeinte Study Community
communityPage.description: Connect with other students, resolve doubts, share strategies, and find support for your exams in Zeinte.
communityPage.noTopicsFoundFor: No topics found for "{{searchTerm}}" in the Zeinte community.
communityPage.tryOtherKeywords: Try different keywords or check your spelling.
communityPage.footerDisclaimer: Remember: Topic and reply creation is simulated. You'll be able to participate actively in the Zeinte community in the future!

adminPage.accessDeniedDescription: You do not have permission to access this section.
adminPage.firebaseConfigErrorDescription: Firebase Firestore is not configured or available. The admin panel cannot function correctly. Please check environment variables in `.env.local` and the Firebase console.
adminPage.welcomeMessage: Welcome, {{email}}. Here you can view and manage registered users in Zeinte.
adminPage.errorLoadingUsersPermissionDenied: Permission error loading users. Ensure Firestore security rules allow the admin to read the 'users' collection. Check Firebase Console > Firestore Database > Rules.
adminPage.noUsersRegistered: No registered users yet in Zeinte.
adminPage.noUsersMatchSearch: No users found matching the search.
adminPage.deleteUserDisclaimerDescription: The "Delete User" function in this panel only removes the user's record from the Firestore database ('users' collection). **It does not delete the account from Firebase Authentication.** For complete deletion, you would need to use the Firebase Admin SDK in a secure backend environment.
adminPage.editUserDialogDescription: Modify the user's display name and plan (tier).
adminPage.deleteUserDialogDescription: Estás a punto de eliminar el registro del usuario {{email}} de la base de datos Firestore. Esta acción **no elimina la cuenta del sistema de autenticación de Firebase**. El usuario podría seguir existiendo en Firebase Auth. ¿Estás seguro de que quieres continuar? Esta acción no se puede deshacer.
adminPage.userDeletedToastDescription: {{email}}'s record has been deleted from the database.
adminPage.errorDeletingUserToastDescription: No se pudo eliminar el usuario de Firestore: {{error}}
adminPage.communityContentManagementDescription: Moderar temas y mensajes del foro, gestionar categorías, etc.
adminPage.appGeneralConfigDescription: Ajustes globales de la aplicación, parámetros de IA, gestión de planes (futuro), etc.

adminCommunityManagementPage.accessDeniedDescription: You do not have permission to access this section.
adminCommunityManagementPage.title: Community Content Management - Zeinte (Firestore)
adminCommunityManagementPage.seedDataCardDescription: Use this button to populate Firestore with sample forum data. Replace placeholder UIDs in the code before use.
adminCommunityManagementPage.seedDataErrorConfig: Not authorized or DB not configured.
adminCommunityManagementPage.seedDataErrorChecking: Error checking existing data. Seeding aborted.
adminCommunityManagementPage.seedDataAlreadySeeded: Forum data appears to have been seeded already or the collection is not empty. Skipping.
adminCommunityManagementPage.seedDataSuccess: Successfully seeded initial forum topics and posts to Firestore.
adminCommunityManagementPage.seedDataNote: Note: This action will try not to duplicate data if topics already exist. Ensure you have replaced placeholder UIDs in `AdminCommunityManagementPage.tsx` and `firestoreSeedData.ts`.
adminCommunityManagementPage.forumTopicsCardDescription: View, edit, and delete community topics and messages. Changes are persistent.
adminCommunityManagementPage.noTopicsToShow: No forum topics to display in Firestore.
adminCommunityManagementPage.postsDialogDescription: View, edit, or delete messages from the topic. Changes are persistent in Firestore.
adminCommunityManagementPage.editPostDialogDescription: Modify the message content. Changes will be saved to Firestore.
adminCommunityManagementPage.postUpdatedToastDescription: The message content has been modified in Firestore.
adminCommunityManagementPage.deletePostDialogDescription: You are about to delete this message from Firestore. This action cannot be undone. Are you sure?
adminCommunityManagementPage.postDeletedToastDescription: The message has been deleted from Firestore.
adminCommunityManagementPage.deleteTopicDialogDescription: You are about to delete this topic and all its associated messages from Firestore. This action cannot be undone. Are you sure?
adminCommunityManagementPage.topicDeletedToastDescription: The topic and its messages have been deleted from Firestore.
adminCommunityManagementPage.errorDeletingTopicToastDescription: Could not delete the topic and its messages.
adminCommunityManagementPage.firebaseConfigErrorDescription: Firebase Firestore is not configured or available. The community management panel cannot function.

adminAppSettingsPage.accessDeniedDescription: You do not have permission to access this section.
adminAppSettingsPage.firebaseConfigErrorDescription: Firebase is not configured. Settings cannot function.
adminAppSettingsPage.title: General Application Settings - Zeinte
adminAppSettingsPage.maxFilesUploadLabel: Maximum number of files to upload:
adminAppSettingsPage.maxFilesUploadDescription: Define how many files a user can upload at once in Zeinte.
adminAppSettingsPage.maxTotalSizeMBDescription: Suggested total size limit for file uploads in Zeinte. This affects the "Re-analyze" capability.
adminAppSettingsPage.defaultAiModelDescription: For analysis and prediction in Zeinte. Affects the question prediction flow.
adminAppSettingsPage.defaultTemperatureDescription: Value between 0 and 1. Affects the question prediction flow.
adminAppSettingsPage.importantNoteDescription: Currently, only "File Upload Limits" and "AI Configuration" for the question prediction flow are functional in Zeinte. Other advanced options and subscription plan management will be implemented in future versions and are conceptually managed for now.
adminAppSettingsPage.configSavedToastDescriptionFileUploadLim: File upload limits have been updated.
adminAppSettingsPage.invalidValuesToastDescription: Limits must be positive numbers. Temperature must be between 0 and 1.
adminAppSettingsPage.firestoreSecurityRulesFooter: Remember to configure Firestore security rules to allow the admin to write to `appSettings/globalConfig` and authenticated users (or AI flows if running with service identity) to read it.

authContext.firebaseGeneralConfigError: General Firebase Configuration Error: The application could not connect correctly. This is usually due to missing or incorrect environment variables (NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_...) in '.env.local'. Please review your '.env.local' file and server console logs. After correcting the .env.local file, YOU MUST RESTART your development server. Authentication and database functions will not work until this is resolved.
authContext.firebaseServicesUnavailable: AuthContext: Firebase services are not configured or available. Authentication features will be disabled.
authContext.firebaseAuthOrDbError: AuthContext: Critical error - Firebase auth or firestore service instance is undefined. Authentication will not work properly.
authContext.authConfigNotFoundGoogle: Google provider configuration error (auth/configuration-not-found). Ensure Google sign-in provider is correctly enabled and configured in your Firebase Console (Authentication -> Sign-in method -> Google -> Enable). You may also need to configure the OAuth consent screen in Google Cloud Console.
authContext.unauthorizedDomainError: Unauthorized domain error (auth/unauthorized-domain). The domain you are trying to authenticate from is not in the list of authorized domains in your Firebase Console. Go to Firebase Console -> Authentication -> Settings (or Sign-in method -> Authorized domains) and add your domain (e.g., 'localhost' for development).
authContext.operationNotAllowedError: Operation not allowed (auth/operation-not-allowed). Ensure the sign-in method you are trying to use (e.g., Email/Password or Google) is enabled in your Firebase Console (Authentication -> Sign-in method).
authContext.emailInUseError: This email is already in use.
authContext.weakPasswordError: The password is too weak. It must be at least 6 characters long.
authContext.userNotFoundError: Incorrect credentials. Check your email and password.
authContext.popupBlockedError: The Google pop-up was blocked or canceled. Please enable pop-ups for this site and try again.
authContext.accountExistsWithDifferentCredentialErro: An account already exists with this email but with a different sign-in method (e.g., Google or password). Try signing in with the original method.
authContext.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred ({{errorCode}}). Please try again. If the problem persists, check Firebase configuration.
authContext.logoutAttemptFailedConfigOrAuth: AuthContext: Logout attempt failed because Firebase is not configured or auth service is unavailable.
authContext.firestoreUnavailableSaveUser: AuthContext: Firestore DB instance is not available, cannot save user.
authContext.tooManyRequestsError: Too many failed login attempts. Please try again later or reset your password.
authContext.tooManyRequestsResendEmailError: You have tried to resend the verification email too many times. Please wait a moment before trying again.
authContext.resendVerificationNotLoggedIn: You must be logged in to resend the verification email.
authContext.resendVerificationGoogleUser: Google users do not require email verification through this method.
authContext.resendVerificationSuccess: Verification email resent to {{email}}. Please check your inbox and spam folder.

upgradeProAlert.title: Unlock Pro Features in Zeinte!
upgradeProAlert.featureUnavailable: The "{{featureName}}" feature is exclusive to the Pro Plan.

legal.legalNotice: Legal Notice and Terms of Use
legal.disclaimerText: Zeinte es una herramienta de ayuda al estudio basada en inteligencia artificial. Los resultados y predicciones generados son para fines orientativos y no garantizan el éxito en ningún examen. El usuario es responsable del uso de la información proporcionada. Search and Make S.L. no se hace responsable de errores, omisiones o interpretaciones del contenido generado. Nos reservamos el derecho de modificar la aplicación y sus funcionalidades en cualquier momento. Los datos de uso se recopilan de forma anónima para mejorar la aplicación.

createPage.title: Create Custom Course with AI
createPage.description: Define the main characteristics of your ideal course and let our AI propose an initial syllabus. Por ahora, esta sección es accesible solo para administradores.
createPage.descriptionForAllUsers: Define the main characteristics of your ideal course and let our AI propose an initial syllabus. Explore this feature!
createPage.topicPlaceholder: E.g., Quantum Physics for Beginners, Advanced Digital Marketing
createPage.goalsPlaceholder: E.g., Understand basic X concepts, Be able to apply Y in real projects
createPage.audiencePlaceholder: E.g., University students, Professionals seeking a career change
createPage.validationErrorDescription: Please complete the course topic and level.
createPage.syllabusGeneratedDescription: Review the AI-suggested syllabus. You can accept it or generate a new one.
createPage.syllabusProposalDescription: This is an initial suggestion generated by the AI. Review it and decide if it fits your needs.
createPage.moduleContentPlaceholder: Detailed module content (AI will develop this after acceptance).
createPage.preparingCourseDescription: Our AI is working on creating your personalized course. This may take a few minutes.
createPage.coursePreparationStartedDescription: The AI has started preparing your course. We'll notify you when it's ready (future functionality).
createPage.betaNote: Note: Full course content generation and progress tracking are features under development.
createPage.courseReadyDescription: Your course content has been generated. You can now start exploring it.
createPage.moduleContentError: Could not generate content for this module.
createPage.moduleContentErrorGeneric: An error occurred while generating content for this module.
createPage.coursePreparationPatience: This process may take a few minutes. Please be patient.

writtenQuestionCard.cardDescription: Develop your answer in the text area. You can attach an image if needed.
writtenQuestionCard.analysisSoonDescription: The functionality to analyze written and image answers with AI will be available in future versions.

verifyEmailPage.title: Verify Your Email
verifyEmailPage.description: We've sent a verification link to {{email}}. Please check your inbox and click the link to activate your account.
verifyEmailPage.spamWarning: If you don't see the email, please check your spam or junk folder. It might take a few minutes to arrive.
verifyEmailPage.loginAfterVerification: Once verified, you can close this page and log in or continue.
verifyEmailPage.notYetVerifiedDescription: It seems your email hasn't been verified yet. Please click the link in the email we sent.
